title: Spunky's Better CPVP
description: A simple modpack Focused on the Crystal PVP Experience and optimizations! (Available for 1.20.1 - Latest 26.1)
body:
Spunky's Better CPVP is a **lightweight yet powerful modpack** designed specifically for players who love **Crystal PVP (CPVP)**. Unlike bloated modpacks that slow down your game, this pack focuses on **boosting FPS, improving hit detection, and giving you an edge in battles!**

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eaf23726a62c7c004ca58006fa258b1fd6aeac6.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)

## 🔥 Key Features

### ✅ Optimized Performance

- High FPS boosts for smooth gameplay.
- Low-latency mods for **faster hit registration**.
- Tweaked settings to reduce lag spikes.

### 🗡️ Enhanced Combat Mechanics

- Improved movement fluidity for better strafing.
- Better hit detection for more accurate fights.
- Customizable keybinds for quick actions.

### 🎯 Designed for All Crystal PVP Modes

- Perfect for **Crystal PVP**, **Pot PVP**, and **NoDebuff**.
- Works smoothly on **PvP servers like Minemen Club, PvPLegacy, and Hypixel**.
- **Low input delay** for fast and responsive fights.

## 🚀 Why Choose Spunky's Better CPVP?

Unlike generic PVP modpacks, this one is **lightweight, efficient, and built for serious fighters**. Whether you're an **experienced Crystal PVP player** or just getting started, this modpack will help you **maximize your potential** with zero lag and full control over your fights
